desc: Lovely 4 bed, 2 bath split level with open floor plan. Updated granite kitchen with new appliances. Vaulted ceilings, manicured landscaping, fenced private backyard. Close to schools and NYC ferry, bus & train.
description:
Lovely 4-bedroom, 2-bath split level with a bright, open floor plan designed for comfortable living and entertaining. The updated kitchen features granite countertops and brand-new appliances.

Vaulted ceilings add volume and light to the main living areas. Outside, manicured landscaping surrounds the home, and a fenced private backyard provides a safe space for family and pets. Ideally located close to schools and with easy access to the NYC ferry, bus, and NJ Transit train.
